message:
test(phase3): add 49 new tests for hostcall modules and cross-module integration

- tests/phase3_cross_module_integration.rs: 24 tests covering io_uring lane,
  S3-FIFO admission, mean-field controller, OPE evaluator, and composed pipelines
- src/hostcall_superinstructions.rs: 18 new tests (5→23) for cost estimation,
  disabled compiler, empty/single traces, min support, max window, plan sorting,
  serde roundtrip, prefix matching, selection edge cases, signature determinism
- src/hostcall_rewrite.rs: 7 new tests (3→10) for no-better-candidate path,
  cheapest selection, empty candidates, ambiguity resolution, accessors
- src/extension_replay.rs: fix clippy manual_unwrap_or lint

Beads: bd-gl7b2, bd-27q02

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
